mapper.select:
SELECT TBN.notice_seq, TBN.ctgr_cd, TBN.title, TBN.content, TBN.popup_flag, TBN.fix_flag, TBN.str_date, TBN.end_date, TBN.view_cnt, TBN.rgst_user_id, TO_CHAR(TBN.rgst_date_time,'YYYY-MM-DD') AS rgstDateTime, TBN.upt_user_id, TBN.upt_date_time, TBN.file_seq, TBN.use_flag, (CASE TBN.popup_flag WHEN true THEN '사용' ELSE '미사용' END) AS popupFlagLabel, (CASE TBN.fix_flag WHEN true THEN '사용' ELSE '미사용' END) AS fixFlagLabel, TCC.cm_nm AS ctgrNm, TU.user_name AS rgstUserNm FROM tb_notice TBN LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_com_cd TCC ON TBN.ctgr_cd = TCC.cm_std_cd LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_user TU ON TBN.rgst_user_id = TU.user_id WHERE 1=1
AND TBN.use_flag = true
AND TBN.title LIKE '%'||#{title}||'%'
ORDER BY TBN.notice_seq
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_notice ( ctgr_cd, title, content, popup_flag, fix_flag, str_date, end_date, view_cnt, rgst_user_id, rgst_date_time, upt_user_id, upt_date_time, file_seq, use_flag ) VALUES ( #{ctgrCd}, #{title}, #{content}, #{popupFlag}, #{fixFlag}, #{strDate}, #{endDate}, #{viewCnt}, #{rgstUserId}, NOW(), #{uptUserId}, NOW(), #{fileSeq}, #{useFlag} );
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_notice SET ctgr_cd = #{ctgrCd}, title = #{title}, content=#{content}, popup_flag=#{popupFlag}, fix_flag=#{fixFlag}, str_date=#{strDate}, end_date=#{endDate}, view_cnt=#{viewCnt}, upt_user_id=#{uptUserId}, upt_date_time=NOW(), file_seq=#{fileSeq}, use_flag = #{useFlag} WHERE notice_seq=#{noticeSeq}
